assertions.title: Derivatives exchange detail returns venue metadata

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with venue metadata fields, tickers omitted by default
steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned with complete venue metadata and no tickers field

responseBodyExcerpt.name: Binance Futures
responseBodyExcerpt.description: Binance Futures is Binance's derivatives venue for perpetual and dated futures markets.

assertions.title: Derivatives exchange detail includes explicit identity fields

steps.expected: Response includes explicit id, name, and stable summary fields
steps.observed: Response contains id='binance_futures', name='Binance Futures', plus summary fields (open_interest_btc, trade_volume_24h_btc, number_of_perpetual_pairs, etc.)

assertions.title: Derivatives exchange detail includes tickers when requested

steps.expected: Response includes tickers array when explicitly requested
steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned with tickers array containing perpetual/futures contract entries

assertions.title: Derivatives exchange detail rejects unknown ids cleanly

steps.expected: HTTP 404 with stable not-found error response
steps.observed: HTTP 404 returned with structured error: {error: 'not_found', message: 'Derivatives exchange not found: unknown_venue_12345'}

assertions.title: Derivatives exchange detail validates include flag

steps.expected: HTTP 400 with explicit validation error for unsupported include value
steps.observed: HTTP 400 returned with validation error: {error: 'invalid_request', details: {fieldErrors: {include_tickers: ['Invalid enum value. Expected 'true' | 'false', received 'invalid']}}}

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed. The /derivatives/exchanges/{id} endpoint correctly returns venue metadata with identity fields (VAL-CORE-026, VAL-CORE-026A), omits tickers by default (implicit in VAL-CORE-026), includes tickers when requested with include_tickers=true (VAL-CORE-027), returns stable 404 for unknown IDs (VAL-CORE-028), and validates the include_tickers parameter rejecting invalid values with 400 (VAL-CORE-029).
